name: Authentication
description: Covers login, signup, and password reset functionality for the Rider App.

name: Login
description: Tests for user login via email, phone, and social authentication.

name: Password Reset
description: Covers password recovery via email and OTP verification.

name: Booking Flow
description: Full end-to-end flow for searching, confirming, and completing a ride booking.

name: Trip Management
description: Driver-side flows for accepting, navigating, and completing trips.

name: Earnings & Payouts
description: Validates calculation and display of driver earnings and transaction history.

name: User Management
description: Covers CRUD operations for users and roles in Cuorium Admin Panel.

name: Booking Overview
description: Ensures accurate listing, filtering, and sorting of active and past bookings.

name: API Booking Lifecycle
description: Validates core endpoints for creating, updating, and cancelling bookings via API.

name: Booking Status Updates
description: Tests booking transitions from CREATED → CONFIRMED → COMPLETED → CANCELLED.

name: Dashboard Metrics
description: Validates data integrity and visualization accuracy for KPI dashboards.
